prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第53名，近年排名在46–58名之间波动，2026年较2025年上升3位，整体层次稳固；2026年声誉评 价偏正面，主要源于81岁博士在华师毕业的终身学习事迹；抖音热度排名第89位（一般），短视频曝光量中等，未见明显报考热度激增信号；近年无投档断档记录；教育学A+、中国史A-、心理学A-、政治学A-、马克思主义理论A-，共5个A-及以上学科，其中教育学为A+王牌，对师范类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机 类、电子信息类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；本省物理类考生2021年16.6万→2025年26.1万，2026年总考生52.1万，按比例估算物理类约37.96万人，较2025年增长约45.7%，考 生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；华中师范大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，对江苏 考生有一定跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次34888名、2026年计划小幅扩招7.2%对竞争略有缓解、但本省物理类 考生大幅增长约45.7%导致竞争显著加剧，以及学校声誉偏正面、软科排名小幅上升等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年前移（更难进）；预测最低位次约36365名，区间35 865–36865名。

- 数学类（数学与应用数学英才班、数据计算及应用）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17614 → 20681 → 37178 → 36502 → 34888. There was a significant backward shift from 2021 to 2023, followed by a recovery in 2024 and 2025, with a cumulative forward shift of about 2290 places over the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 34,888. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 51 in both 2021 and 2022, 52 in 2023, 55 in 2024, 69 in 2025, and 74 in 2026, representing a moderate expansion of about 7.2% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 53rd in 2026, fluctuating between 46th and 58th in recent years, rising 3 places from 2025, indicating a stable overall level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is generally positive, mainly due to the lifelong learning story of an 81-year-old doctoral graduate from CCNU. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 89th (average), with moderate short video exposure and no obvious signs of a surge in application popularity. There have been no recent records of admission gaps. It has 5 disciplines rated A- or above: Education (A+), Chinese History (A-), Psychology (A-), Political Science (A-), and Marxist Theory (A-), with Education being a top-tier A+ discipline, strongly attracting teacher-training applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. The number of provincial Physics Category examinees increased from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, and the total number of examinees in 2026 is 521,000, with an estimated Physics Category count of about 379,600, representing a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025, sharply intensifying competition. Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Jiangsu applicants.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 34,888, a modest 7.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 slightly easing competition, but a substantial 45.7% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees sharply intensifying competition, along with a positive university reputation and a slight rise in the Soft Science ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 36,365, with a range of 35,865 to 36,865.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics Elite Class, Data Computing and Application)
- Electronic Information (Intelligent Equipment and Systems, Integrated Circuits, Communication Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Chemistry (Chemistry Elite Class, Intelligent Chemistry)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Sciences Elite Class, Biotechnology)
- Geographical Sciences (Geographical Sciences Elite Class, Geographic Information Science)
- Psychology (Psychology, Applied Psychology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Administration
- Finance (Financial Engineering, Digital Economy)
- E-commerce
- Education (Education, Integrated Education, Special Education)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 35,865–36,865, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 35,000), prioritize competitive majors like Computer Science and Mathematics. If the ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., beyond 36,800), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3955 → 3902 → 5804 → 5138 → 4889. It stabilized around 3900 in 2021–2022, dropped significantly to 5804 in 2023, and rebounded for two consecutive years to 4889 in 2024–2025, with a cumulative forward shift of about 915 positions over the last two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 4889. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 29 in 2021–2022, 28 in 2023, 26 in 2024, 15 in 2025, and 22 in 2026, an increase of about 46.7% compared to 2025, significantly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 53rd in 2026, fluctuating between 46th and 58th in recent years, rising 3 places in 2026 compared to 2025, with a stable overall level. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat positive, mainly due to the lifelong learning story of an 81-year-old PhD graduate from CCNU. On Douyin, it ranks 89th in popularity (average), with moderate short video exposure and no obvious signs of a surge in application enthusiasm. There have been no recent records of admission cut-off gaps. It has A+ in Education, A- in Chinese History, A- in Psychology, A- in Political Science, and A- in Marxist Theory, totaling five A- or above disciplines, with Education being an A+ flagship, strongly attracting normal university applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Normal University and Chinese Language and Literature have a stable and slightly warm social popularity. The number of History Category candidates in the province was 94,700 in 2021 → 97,100 in 2025, with a total of 521,000 candidates in 2026, estimated at about 141,400 for History Category, an increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Jiangsu candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4889, the significant 46.7% expansion in the 2026 plan alleviating competition, but the substantial 45.6% increase in provincial History Category candidates intensifying competition, roughly offsetting each other. The university's reputation is somewhat positive, and the Soft Science ranking has slightly risen. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly lower (slightly easier to enter) than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6288, with a range of 5788–6788.

For rankings near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 6500), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
